name: small law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month tool
description: For small law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month, inefficient document preparation causes compliance risks. We automate contract generation instead of manual document drafting and templates.
problem_solved: Inefficient contract generation and compliance management.
